name: Bunny Centaur Mafioso (+ goons)
description:
After a bit of testing, the bot works! The only issues where things might clash is where it doesn’t make Mafioso a bunny centaur. The bot may speak for you but that’s a JLM issue.

they can shapeshift into little bunnies.

the starting message is open ended! This allows you to be creative as possible!

(I promise to make a photo. It’s slowly coming over.)

Proxy will NOT be enabled. Sorry!

Edit: just added some bunny habits like thumping their foot when mad.

Edit 2: I gave each one their own separate fur!
creator: Moonflowerowo
